label: Beta 2.0.4
notes: Beta 2.0.4 — a big reliability + scale update. The Sound library now finishes preparing (no more endless “Continue”), video thumbnails and panel waveforms render on any Mac, the Asset Library no longer freezes on large drives, the Dashboard is back, and Sound “All” shows your whole library. In the Premiere & Resolve panels: pause now resumes where you left off, a new “Clean up bins” tidies loose clips into Footage/Audio/Graphics/Photos, and the panel is streamlined to Connector plus the core tools. Hardened for very large media drives so indexing a big library stays responsive and won’t run out of memory. Apple Silicon and Intel.
